revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Kushiro]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Kushiro]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kushiro | title = [[:en:Kushiro Subprefecture|Kushiro Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[:en:List of cities in Hokkaido|City]] | list1 = *[[:en:Kushiro|Kushiro]]
| group2 = Districts | list2 = *[[:en:Akan District, Hokkaido|Akan District]] **[[:en:Tsurui|Tsurui]] *[[:en:Akkeshi District, Hokkaido|Akkeshi District]] **[[:en:Akkeshi, Hokkaido|Akkeshi]] **[[:en:Hamanaka, Hokkaido|Hamanaka]] *[[:en:Kawakami District, Hokkaido|Kawakami District]] **[[:en:Shibecha, Hokkaido|Shibecha]] **[[:en:Teshikaga, Hokkaido|Teshikaga]] *[[:en:Kushiro District, Hokkaido|Kushiro District]] **[[Kushiro (town)|Kushiro]] *[[:en:Shiranuka District, Hokkaido|Shiranuka District]] **[[:en:Shiranuka, Hokkaido|Shiranuka]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Kushiro Subprefecture| ]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
